items.title: NEWS: Imaging Sunday showed that #Magic rookie Izaiyah Nelson suffered a fracture in his left ankle.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
NEWS: Imaging Sunday showed that #Magic rookie Izaiyah Nelson suffered a fracture in his left ankle.

Nelson will undergo surgery and is expected to return to basketball activities in 3-4 months.

items.title: #Magic summer league coach D.J. Bakker confirmed Orlando rookie Izaiyah Nelson suffered a sprained left ankle vs. Portland when I asked for an update postgame.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
#Magic summer league coach D.J. Bakker confirmed Orlando rookie Izaiyah Nelson suffered a sprained left ankle vs. Portland when I asked for an update postgame.

“We don’t play again until Wednesday so we’ll give him a chance to recover and see where he’s at,” Bakker said.

items.title: #Magic rookie Izaiyah Nelson suffered a sprained left ankle in today's Summer League game vs. Portland, I'm told. He's considered day-to-day.

items.title: My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: #Magic rookie Izaiyah Nelson, as well as second-year pros Jase Richardson and Noah Penda, will headline Orlando’s summer league roster, that includes Cam Reddish, Ricky Council IV and plenty of Osceola ties.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: #Magic rookie Izaiyah Nelson, as well as second-year pros Jase Richardson and Noah Penda, will headline Orlando’s summer league roster, that includes Cam Reddish, Ricky Council IV and plenty of Osceola ties.

More inside: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/07/02/o...

media.title: Magic summer league roster includes Nelson, Richardson, Penda, among older group
media.description: New Magic assistant coach D.J. Bakker will lead an experienced summer league group in Las Vegas next week.

items.title: Breaking News: The #Magic are signing second-round pick Izaiyah Nelson to a two-way contract, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com. Orlando selected Nelson with the No. 51 overall pick in this year’s draft.

items.body_excerpt: Breaking News: The #Magic are signing second-round pick Izaiyah Nelson to a two-way contract, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com. Orlando selected Nelson with the No. 51 overall pick in this year’s draft.

items.title: My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: The #Magic drafted Izaiyah Nelson, but where does he fit in Orlando’s future?
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: The #Magic drafted Izaiyah Nelson, but where does he fit in Orlando’s future?

“… It’s about just bringing in talent, character, toughness and integrity, and we’ll figure the rest out as we go,” Jeff Weltman said.

More: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/06/25/o...

media.title: Magic trade to draft Izaiyah Nelson, but where does he fit in Orlando’s future?
media.description: Magic president of basketball operations Jeff Weltman said it was “too soon” to discuss where rookie Izaiyah Nelson fits into the equation for Orlando.

items.title: “For what we walked away with in the draft and where we were, we’re very pleased to draft a guy like Izaiyah,” #Magic president of basketball operations Jeff Weltman said about Orlando trading for second-round pick Izaiyah Nelson.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
“For what we walked away with in the draft and where we were, we’re very pleased to draft a guy like Izaiyah,” #Magic president of basketball operations Jeff Weltman said about Orlando trading for second-round pick Izaiyah Nelson.

items.title: New: “He’s about the grind. He’s really all about it,” #Magic president of basketball operations Jeff Weltman told me and Dan Savage over the phone late Wednesday night about Orlando’s Izaiyah Nelson. “He’s tough. He’s a hit-first guy...”

items.body_excerpt:

items.title: With the No. 51 pick in the 2026 NBA draft, the #Magic select South Florida forward Izaiyah Nelson.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
With the No. 51 pick in the 2026 NBA draft, the #Magic select South Florida forward Izaiyah Nelson.

Orlando is keeping Nelson, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com

Nelson was the 2025-26 AAC’s player of the year, defensive player of the year and newcomer of the year.

items.title: Everything I said about Henri Veesar and the Orlando Magic -- applies with Izaiyah Nelson
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Everything I said about Henri Veesar and the Orlando Magic -- applies with Izaiyah Nelson

I do like Nelson's activity on both ends, but he's not shooting it anytime soon.
